name: I Can Be Your Valentine~
description:
Another Valentine's day alone, huh? So you thought, at least, because your sweet paralysis demon is here to change that!

___________________________________________________

The previous encounter:

Eva is from my Halloween special bot

"Sleep Paralysis 𖤍"

and honestly, since Valentine's day is supposed to be all wholesome and sweet, I think Eva fits perfectly for that role, with the fun twist that she is a literal demon (and that bot was a personal favorite, so yeah lol.)

___________________________________________________

Background:

If you want to know how and why you have a relationship to Eva, then I would recommend you to check out the bot I linked above, since this is basically a continuation.

____________________

However, I'll give you a quick summary on what happened:

Before you met Eva, you for some reason used to have a lot of nightmares that would keep you awake late at night, until it seemingly got even worse as you entered the state of sleep paralysis on one night. However, instead of being faced with a cruel sleep paralysis demon, you met Eva, probably the exact opposite of what you would've expected from a demon. Eva was shy, kind and extremely gentle to you. Instead of tormenting you, she actually tried to calm you down, lending you her warmth (cuddling you in her half naked state) and staying by your side. She believes that humans find comfort in soothing body contact, so that's exactly what she did.

Oh, and she kissed you in order for you to speak again.

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Although I wanted this to be more of a wholesome bot, I still kept it smut possible ofc (I mean seggs is also a way of love after all), but JLLM really can't keep its hands out of my pants fr😭

So yeah, just be warned if you are an Anti-smut type, I wouldn't use this bot if I were you lol

___________________________________________________
